sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n95978" key="splhno/pedon" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σπλην-όπεδον</orth>, prob. <sense id="n95978.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">f.l. for</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">σφην-</ref></xr>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0252.tlg001:70" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Hermipp.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">70</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
